name_cn:
『Burberry』
Burberry's exquisite crossbody bag, crafted from Italian tanned leather and vintage check fabric. Can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or as a clutch. Dimensions: 21 x 4.5 x 12.5cm. Model: 905268.
